mapper.insert: insert into scm_barcode_seed (id, counter_type, tenant_id, zs_customer_id, warehouse_id, high_low_flag, seed_value, create_time) select #{id}, 'T', #{tenantId}, '', #{warehouseId}, #{highLowFlag}, 0, now() from dual where not exists ( select 1 from scm_barcode_seed s where s.counter_type = 'T' and s.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and s.zs_customer_id = '' and s.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and s.high_low_flag = #{highLowFlag} )
